name: juzi-windows-elevation
description: Auditable Windows elevation and protected production cutover workflow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run UAC changes with protected baselines and real verification.
interface.longDescription: A failure-tested, hash-locked UAC protocol with one-time authorization, rollback, and non-admin real-chain verification.
interface.defaultPrompt: Prepare a failure-tested Windows elevation request with a protected baseline, rollback, and non-admin verification.
